counters.description: watch out for his energy bar, he can almost one shot you early. aim to get null magic mantle and watchout for his e since it reduces your magic resist!
vayne is always dangerous cause she is made to kill tanks. so be careful to not overstep in the lane so she doesn't run you down.
she is a threat in lane but you outperform her in teamfight cause if ambessa get's cc'ed she is doomed.
you can almost never try to q this because its very easy for her to react with her w.
when playing this you should aim to play safe and try to get as much farm as you can.
darius is always a lanebully so try not to overstep in the lane otherwise he ghost and run you down.
gp is a tank slayer due to his true dmg he gets after hitting a barrel.
